title: Molecular tools for on-site rapid detection of pathogens
subtitle: Molekulārās metodes ātrai patogēnu noteikšanai uz vietas saimniecībā
description: A guide summarizing molecular recombinase polymerase amplification (RPA) methods for rapid, on-site detection of plant pathogens. It highlights the use of Agdia’s AmplifyRP® platform for simple, sensitive, and equipment-free field diagnostics of vegetable viruses.
